zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Washington於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾道爾頓時，她的父親John de Washington26歲，母親Jane Augusta24歲。她於1252年與James Lawrence在英國英格蘭藍卡爾道爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1285年在英國艾可格亞特 登莫福享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Washington于大约1230年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾道爾頓时，她的父亲John de Washington26岁，母亲Jane Augusta24岁。她于1252年与James Lawrence在英国英格兰藍卡爾道爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1285年在英国艾可格亞特 登莫福享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Washington in Durham, possibly also from Washington in Sussex. The Durham placename derives from an Old English personal name Hwassa, Hwæssa + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. In North America, this surname is by far most common among African Americans (see 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Washington (or George Washington), adopted in honor of George Washington, the 1st president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in most cases probably for the same reason.

History: George Washington (1732–99), 1st president of the US (1789–97), was born at Bridges Creek, VA. His great-grandfather had emigrated from Dillicar in Westmorland in 1658. George Washington was a slaveowner, but he became troubled with the institution of slavery. Shortly before his death he decided that his slaves have to be freed after the death of his wife. — With the passage of time, the surname Washington has come to be borne by more African Americans (around 90% of all bearers) than English-Americans. A prominent example was the educator Booker T. Washington (1856–1915), born a slave in VA, who adopted his surname from his stepfather, Washington Ferguson.

variants.name: President
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word president, probably adopted as a surname in honor of one of the early presidents of the US (compare Washington and Jefferson ) or simply because of the importance of the presidential function.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Washington was born about 1230, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Washington, was 26 and her mother, Jane Augusta, was 24. She married James Lawrence in 1252, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1285, in Great Dunmow, Essex, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Washington est née environ 1230, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Washington, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Augusta, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé James Lawrence en 1252, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1285, à Great Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Washington um 1230 in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Washington 26 und ihre Mutter Jane Augusta 24. Sie hat 1252 in Dalton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom James Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1285 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Great Dunmow, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Washington è nata il circa 1230 nel Dalton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Washington, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jane Augusta, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato James Lawrence nel 1252, nel Dalton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1285, nel Great Dunmow, Essex, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Washingtonが約1230年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンで生まれた時，父John de Washingtonは26歳，母Jane Augustaは24歳であった。1252年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンでJames Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1285年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ダンモウで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Washington(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 돌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Washington(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Augusta(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 돌턴에서 James Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 영국 에세스 그리트 던모에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Washington родилась около 1230 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Washington было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Augusta, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Lawrence в 1252 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1285 г. в местности грит дунмоу, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
